## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Superhuman's CMS (Ghost) and content strategy with GrowthX for upcoming SEO content collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Superhuman uses Ghost CMS for blog management, with content categorized into News, Sales, Productivity, and Leadership](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential to add new categories (e.g., AI) and redesign blog in Q2, aligning with updated brand design](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Need to establish guidelines for imagery, CTAs, and social proof integration in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Access to CMS pending; Alex to share login info and explore sharing options via 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

## Topics

### Blog Structure and Categories

  - [Blog separate from main site, moving from subdomain to main domain](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current categories: News (product announcements), Sales, Productivity, Leadership](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Considering new AI category due to high content volume](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Blog redesign planned for Q2 2024, including potential information architecture updates](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### CMS Walkthrough (Ghost)

  - Login via <ghost@superhuman.com> (specific access details pending)
  - [Post management: Drafts, Scheduled, Published sections](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Rich text editor with various formatting options (headings, bold, italics, quotes)](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Command-based structure for adding elements (images, HTML, dividers)](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Custom HTML snippets used for brand-consistent CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Content Strategy and Best Practices

  - [Multiple CTAs throughout content, including image elements to break up text](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Hybrid approach: buttons, styled elements, and hyperlink CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [No free trial by default; potential for testing in SEO article flow later](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Social proof integration: Twitter embeds, testimonials from "Love" page](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Leveraging CEO's social media presence (60-70k followers) for brand building](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

### Imagery and Asset Management

  - [Current use of stock imagery and product screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests using Recraft for AI-generated images based on templates](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Superhuman to provide library of approved product images, GIFs, and HTML files](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Arcade tool for interactive feature demos, embeddable via iFrame](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Option to schedule posts or publish immediately](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Ability to edit publication date retroactively](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to compile and share a library of \~12 key product assets (images, GIFs, HTML files) for content use](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Determine guidelines for CTA placement and style in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Alex to follow up on CMS access options via 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [GrowthX to ping Alex in channel or schedule call if issues arise during content uploading](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Discuss potential new blog categories and redesign with Harmony (Superhuman team member)](https://fathom.video/share/oh5b47fxtFh2HYzE2StWkMKoaGrkB1yG?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
